session_summary: Added game over SFX to DeathScreen, fixed PlaySound to use SFXManager, stopped music on GameOver
done: Added gameOverSound serialized field to DeathScreen
Fixed DeathScreen.PlaySound to route through SFXManager.PlayOneShot (standards compliance)
Added MusicManager Stop() on GameState.GameOver so music doesn't clash with stinger
decisions: Placed game over SFX on DeathScreen rather than GameManager to keep GameManager as a pure state machine
Used SFXManager.PlayOneShot instead of raw audioSource.PlayOneShot for volume consistency
next_steps: Assign Game Over sound.m4a to gameOverSound field on DeathScreen in Unity Inspector
No remaining sound-design labeled beads — check bd ready for new work next session
